privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated access control memo created by setup_task.sh. It requires the creation of three new roles ('Team Lead', 'Finance Clerk', 'Program Coordinator') and the reassignment of four specific employees (EMP005, EMP009, EMP014, EMP017) to these roles. All expected roles, employee assignments, and scoring thresholds exactly match the prompt instructions and verifier.py logic.
